description: Dominican-inspired cocktail menu R&D — 12 drinks + side projects

recentDecisions: No cacao nibs in Negroni — Suze handles bitter, nibs would muddy plantain
No default saline in stirred drinks
Guandules orgeat replaces demerara in Coco Concon (Samaná homage)
Cacao husk tea in Tabaquero syrup (Tenares homage)
Add Cynar to Tabaquero, reduce dulce de leche (break sweet cluster)
Push Mabí drier — bark tincture or low-sugar syrup (bone-dry refresher gap)
